eulaBody:
GENERAL TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF SALE AND USE

Article 1 - Company Identification
Company name: SMHRJU
Registered office: 78 Avenue des Champs Elysees, 75008 Paris, France
Registration number: 100957091
Purpose: Platform connecting pilgrims and guides for the organization of religious services (Omra, guided tours, Omra Badal).

Article 2 - Contractual Documents
Use of the application and subscription to a service implies unreserved acceptance of these Terms as well as the following documents, permanently available in the application:
- The Pilgrim Charter.
- The Religious Guide Regulations.
- The Guide Code of Conduct and Operational Rules.

Article 3 - Service Description
The application allows pilgrims to book guidance services in Makkah and Medina, including religious guidance, historical tours and Omra Badal.

Article 4 - Party Commitments

Pilgrim commitments:
The pilgrim commits to providing accurate information, respecting schedules, safety instructions and the ethical principles of Islam.

Guide commitments:
The guide commits to a mission of general interest based on the Quran and the Sunnah. They are required to wear their official vest for identification and to maintain strict punctuality.

Article 5 - Service-Specific Provisions

Omra Badal:
The guide is required to produce and transmit two videos (entering ihram and end of mission) to attest to the completion.

Pickup:
If the hotel is less than 500m from Masjid Al-Haram, the guide goes there directly. Beyond that, a meeting point is agreed upon mutually.

Article 6 - Pricing and Payment Methods
Prices are displayed in the application at the time of booking. Payment is made exclusively online via a secure external platform. No banking data is stored by the application. Payment validation constitutes acceptance of the mission by the guide and of these conditions by the pilgrim.

Article 7 - Liability
The pilgrim remains responsible for their personal belongings, health condition and compliance with local laws.
The guide is responsible for the faithful execution of their mission (Amanah) before the pilgrims and before Allah.
SMHRJU acts as an intermediary and cannot be held responsible in cases of force majeure or fault attributable to the user.

Article 8 - Intellectual Property
All application content (logos, interfaces, texts) is the exclusive property of SMHRJU. Any reproduction or lending of user/guide accounts is strictly prohibited.

Article 9 - Applicable Law and Disputes
These Terms are governed by French law. Any dispute relating to their interpretation or execution falls under the jurisdiction of the Paris courts.

Contact: support@nefsy.app
privacyBody:
PRIVACY POLICY (GDPR COMPLIANT)

Protecting your data is a priority. We process your information in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

Data Collection and Use

Registration data:
We collect your identity information and documents necessary for organizing the mission.

Health:
The pilgrim is responsible for reporting any important medical information for their own safety during the journey.

Meeting and Logistics:
No real-time geolocation data (GPS) is collected by the application. Meeting and pickup points are agreed upon between the pilgrim and guide via secure messaging. The pilgrim provides the necessary logistical information (hotel name, room number for people with reduced mobility) to enable the service.

Media and Proofs:
For Omra Badal services, multimedia files (videos and photos) are collected and transmitted to attest to the completion of rites in accordance with the guide's commitments.

Data Sharing:
For the smooth running of the mission, necessary information (name, specific needs, proof media) is shared exclusively between the pilgrim and the relevant guide. No data is sold to commercial third parties.

Internal Messaging and Confidentiality

Access:
Messaging between pilgrim and guide is activated only after payment validation.

Usage:
Exchanges must be limited exclusively to the spiritual and logistical mission.

Retention:
In accordance with the GDPR minimization principle, messages are not permanently retained. They are deleted from our active servers after mission closure, except where needed for dispute resolution.

Ethics:
Guides are strictly prohibited from using this messaging to divert clients or offer private services outside the platform.

Security and User Rights

Protection:
No banking data is stored by the application, as transactions are processed by a secure external payment provider.

Hosting:
Your data is stored on secure servers with a professional host guaranteeing a high level of protection and confidentiality.

Rights:
You have the right to access, rectify and delete your data.

Account Deletion:
In compliance with Apple and Google requirements, an account deletion button is available in the application settings, resulting in the permanent erasure of your personal data (excluding legal retention obligations).

Account Responsibility
The user is solely responsible for the confidentiality of their credentials. Any substitution, lending or sharing of accounts is a serious violation of the trust commitment (Amanah).

Contact: support@nefsy.app
cancellationBody:
CANCELLATION AND REFUND POLICY

This policy applies to all services booked via the application. Purchasing a service constitutes unreserved acceptance of these conditions.

Deadlines and Applicable Fees

Early cancellation (more than 48h before):
Any service may be cancelled free of charge up to 48 hours before its start, entitling a full refund.

Late cancellation (less than 48h before):
For any cancellation made less than 48 hours before the service, a 25% retention of the total amount is applied. These fees correspond to the management, booking and organization already undertaken.

Request Procedures

Procedure:
Cancellation requests must be made in writing via the application's official communication channel.

Absences:
In case of pilgrim absence or unjustified delay, no refund will be granted, as the service is considered engaged.

Force Majeure
In the event of exceptional circumstances (justified serious illness, administrative decision or unforeseeable event), each situation will be examined with fairness and care by our services.

Contact: support@nefsy.app
